summary: Student Duplicate Merge System - Complete Testing. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All merge UI components verified working including MergeStudentModal (3-step wizard), MergeApprovalsPage (list, detail view, status badges), and Merge button in student detail modal.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/students/{id}/duplicates - returns duplicates list with match_score and match_reasons
Backend: Duplicate detection excludes merged students (merged_into field)
Backend: Duplicate detection returns 404 for invalid student ID
Backend: POST /api/students/merge/preview - returns primary, secondary, merged_preview, secondary_fields_added, transactions_summary
Backend: Preview transactions_summary includes correct LTV, upgrades, notes counts
Backend: Preview returns 404 for invalid student IDs
Backend: GET /api/students/merge/requests - returns list of merge requests
Backend: Merge requests filter by status (pending_cs_head, pending_ceo, approved, rejected)
Backend: Merge request has all required fields (id, primary_student_id, secondary_student_id, status, etc.)
Backend: Approved merge request has approval timestamps (cs_head_approved_at, ceo_approved_at, executed_at)
Backend: POST /api/students/merge/{id}/approve - returns 404 for invalid request ID
Backend: POST /api/students/merge/{id}/reject - returns 404 for invalid request ID
Backend: Cannot approve already approved request (returns 400)
Backend: Cannot reject already approved request (returns 400)
Backend: Merged students excluded from student listing
Backend: Existing approved merge request (Saritha E R) verified
Backend: POST /api/students/merge/request - creates pending merge request or returns 409 for duplicate
Frontend: Merge button visible in student detail modal with GitMerge icon
Frontend: MergeStudentModal opens with 3-step wizard (1-Select Duplicate, 2-Review, 3-Submit)
Frontend: Step indicator shows progress (1, 2, 3) with labels
Frontend: Primary Card (Keep) section displays student info
Frontend: No duplicates detected message shown when no matches found
Frontend: MergeApprovalsPage loads with page title and description
Frontend: Merge request cards display with status badges (Approved & Merged, Rejected)
Frontend: View Details button opens detail modal
Frontend: Detail modal shows Secondary (Being Merged) and Primary (Keeping) sections
Frontend: Merged Record Preview shows all fields including secondary_name, secondary_phone, additional_email
Frontend: Approval timestamps visible (CS Head approved, CEO approved)
Frontend: Rejection reason displayed for rejected requests
Frontend: Sidebar navigation includes Merge Approvals link
critical_code_review_comments: Merge system implementation is complete and well-structured
Duplicate detection uses phone (last 9 digits), email (case-insensitive), and name parts with proper scoring
Match score is capped at 100 as documented
Approval flow correctly implements CS Head → CEO two-stage approval
Merged students are soft-deleted with stage='merged' and merged_into field set
All transactions (ltv_transactions, cs_upgrades, notes, reminders, commissions) are moved to primary student
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_student_merge_system.py - New test file for Student Merge System (20 tests)
seed_data_creation: Used existing merge requests from previous testing (Saritha E R approved merge, Faisal rejected merge)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student Duplicate Merge System fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/students/{id}/duplicates, POST /api/students/merge/preview, POST /api/students/merge/request, GET /api/students/merge/requests, POST /api/students/merge/{id}/approve, POST /api/students/merge/{id}/reject. UI components: MergeStudentModal (3-step wizard in CustomerServicePage), MergeApprovalsPage (/cs/merge-approvals). Existing test data: 1 approved merge (Saritha E R), 1 rejected merge (Faisal → Saritha E R). Merged students have stage='merged' and merged_into field set.
